title: Create: Limited Draining
description: A Create addon that allows you to control the biomes to drain certain fluids infinitely
body:
# Create: Limited Draining
> _"If you want infinite lava, then you'll have to drain it in the nether. But you already knew that."_

![Hints on Hose Pulley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19d98710db6e9056f2526b39a5338fee50b5341.png)

A Create addon that allows you to control the biomes to drain certain fluids infinitely.


By default, it restricts draining infinite lava in the nether only (Controlled by Biome Tag "#createlimiteddraining:infinite_draining_biomes" and Fluid Tag "#createlimiteddraining:infinite_draining_fluids").


This is my first mod, and it's intended to be used in my own modpack Path of Truth. I used Copilot for coding guidance. If you encounter any bugs or have any suggestions, please open an issue on the Github! Thank you!


### Requires Create 6.0.4 on Forge 1.20.1 or NeoForge 1.21.1
